jd.title: Senior Mechanical Design Engineer
jd.company: Global Recruiters of Palmetto (GRN) Automation Recruitment Specialist

requirements.text: Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering (BSME) or Mechanical Engineering Technology (BSMET)Ability to conceptualize and design highly complex automatic machines

jd.full_description:
Our client has over 45 years in the automation industry. They offer their customers automation systems, integrated robotic systems, machine builds, manufacturing services, turnkey installations, maintenance, repair, upgrades, fabrication, custom controls, mechanical and electrical system designs, material handling systems, and other services. They are seeking a Mechanical Engineer III to provide mechanical engineering leadership for projects as well as testing and installation support.
Location: Greensboro, NC
Key Bullet Points:10 years of progressive mechanical engineering experience, including substantial 3D modeling and automation systems design experienceBachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering (BSME) or Mechanical Engineering Technology (BSMET)Ability to conceptualize and design highly complex automatic machines, robotic cells, and material handling systems
Watch: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7059972218251857920
Schedule a time to talk: https://calendly.com/sbryant-grn
To apply for this great opportunity and found out about all the details please contact me, Stormy Bryant, at Sbryant@GRNPalmetto.com or call me today at 803.369.7970
